title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to OpsPal's automation capabilities. You can now promote skills directly through a new command, and OpsPal has expanded its knowledge base to include 683 automation skills across 25 categories. We also strengthened Salesforce deployment reliability and fixed several issues that were preventing proper data imports and workflow execution.

entries.headline: Expanded skill catalog now includes 683 automation skills across 25 categories
Enhanced data import reliability and workflow guidance
Salesforce deployments now recover automatically from errors
Salesforce state and country picklist validation now works correctly
details: OpsPal now properly detects state and country picklist configurations in Salesforce flows
Deployment validation checks permissions more thoroughly before making changes

entries.headline: Multi-step Salesforce deployments now complete successfully
HubSpot automation workflows now launch properly
